scripts.build: pnpm --dir packages/shared-ipc run build && pnpm --dir packages/emulator-protocol run build && pnpm --dir packages/agent-runtime run build && pnpm --dir apps/desktop run build
scripts.package: pnpm --dir packages/shared-ipc run build && pnpm --dir packages/emulator-protocol run build && pnpm --dir packages/agent-runtime run build && pnpm --dir apps/desktop run package
scripts.package:mac: pnpm --dir packages/shared-ipc run build && pnpm --dir packages/emulator-protocol run build && pnpm --dir packages/agent-runtime run build && pnpm --dir apps/desktop run package:mac
scripts.package:win: pnpm --dir packages/shared-ipc run build && pnpm --dir packages/emulator-protocol run build && pnpm --dir packages/agent-runtime run build && pnpm --dir apps/desktop run package:win
scripts.test: pnpm --dir packages/shared-ipc run test && pnpm --dir packages/agent-runtime run test
